jtwc.title: Typhoon 09W (Bavi) Warning #40
jtwc.text:
WTPN31 PGTW 102100
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/TYPHOON 09W (BAVI) WARNING NR 040//
RMKS/
1. TYPHOON 09W (BAVI) WARNING NR 040

   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY

   101800Z --- NEAR 23.8N 125.2E
